---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for STELLA
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is your feature request related to a specific problem?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. How should this feature work?

## Alternative Solutions

Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## Use Case

Describe the use case(s) for this feature. Who would benefit from it?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I am willing to contribute this feature
- [ ] I would like guidance on how to implement this
